name: KFC Amost Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a paste out of the marinade ingredients.
2. Coat chicken evenly with the marinade paste, stacking pieces in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate overnight or for several hours.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the pancake mix with the remaining seasonings (paprika, sage, and pepper).
4. Dip each piece of chicken in milk, then coat with the pancake mixture.
5. Dust off any excess coating on the chicken pieces.
6. Heat 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
7. Brown the chicken pieces for 4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
8. Remove from the skillet and place in a single layer on a shallow baking pan.
9. Seal the chicken with an additional coating of flour.
10. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, then uncover and increase to 400°F for an additional 10 minutes to crisp up the coating.
